message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Digital Public Goods Backlog\nBasic architecture

actor "User" as user
rectangle "backlog.dpg.net" as backlog
rectangle "api.backlog.dpg.net" as api
database "Database" as db

user -> backlog : HTTP GET /projects
activate backlog
backlog -> api : HTTP GET /projects
activate api
api -> db : Query the projects table
activate db
db --> api : Return the results
deactivate db
api --> backlog : JSON response
deactivate api
backlog --> user : HTML response
deactivate backlog

@enduml
```
